title: bigelowia howardii
intro: Bigelowia howardii, also known as Howard's Bigelowia or Bigelow's yarrow, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a flowering plant that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Bigelowia howardii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which have been used to harness its medicinal properties.
